meta_title: For Freelancers: analytics setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Analytics Setup to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Learn how to implement automated analytics using Antigravity and Claude Code to track progress and ship faster.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of objective progress visibility. By implementing automated analytics, you transform subjective 'feelings' into data-driven milestones. Use Antigravity to scaffold your telemetry and Claude Code to inject event tracking, ensuring every feature launch is measurable, validated, and ready for client sign-off.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial excitement of a new client project fades, replaced by the crushing weight of feature creep and 'scope drift.' Your code works, but the finish line keeps moving. You feel stuck because you’re building in the dark, without a clear view of how your features actually perform in the wild.

It’s time to stop guessing. Professional engineering is about shipping, and shipping requires a feedback loop. By integrating lightweight, automated analytics into your development workflow, you stop building for your ego and start building for the metric. Let’s turn your unfinished projects into shipped, successful client deliveries.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metric
steps.description: Identify the one user action that signals project completion. This prevents scope creep by focusing development only on what drives that metric.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project architecture and suggest a single 'North Star' metric based on the core user flow of this SaaS app.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze my current codebase and suggest a North Star metric that defines project completion for this specific app.'

steps.title: Scaffold Telemetry Infrastructure
steps.description: Inject a lightweight analytics wrapper to your base class or service layer to ensure every module has event-tracking capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, reusable analytics service wrapper that supports event tracking for user interactions and system errors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new analytics service module and inject it into the main app entry point.'

steps.title: Instrument Critical User Flows
steps.description: Focus tracking only on the conversion funnel. If a button doesn't lead to a conversion, it doesn't need tracking yet.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a snippet to track user clicks and form submissions in my frontend components using the new analytics service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Identify the primary conversion funnel and add tracking events to the signup and checkout components.'

steps.title: Automate Error Reporting
steps.description: Stop manual debugging. Configure your analytics to capture stack traces, turning 'I can't finish' into 'I fixed the bug'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an error-tracking hook for my analytics service that captures stack traces and logs them to the console.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a global error boundary that logs exceptions to my analytics provider.'

steps.title: Establish the 'Ship' Dashboard
steps.description: Create a simple view that displays your progress toward the North Star metric, providing the psychological closure needed to finish.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simple dashboard component that pulls data from my analytics service and displays the current completion progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a dashboard view that visualizes the North Star metric progress data.'

pro_tips: Track 'time-to-first-value' for your users; if it takes longer than 60 seconds, your project is too complex to finish.
Use feature flags to decouple deployment from release, allowing you to ship unfinished code safely.
Automate your client status reports by pulling directly from your analytics logs—never write a manual project update again.
If you find yourself adding analytics to a non-critical feature, delete that feature immediately.
Set an automated alert for when a user encounters an error; it's the fastest way to build client trust.
content.next_steps: Deploy your telemetry code to a staging environment, run your first user simulation, and verify that your North Star metric is reporting correctly in your dashboard.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects stall in the 'almost done' phase. Implement these systems, gain clarity, and start delivering value to your clients with confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
